gyromitra infula.t: [网络] 赭鹿花菌；头套鹿花菌

gyron.t: n. (纹章学用语)(顶点在纹章中心的)三角形副章
gyron.d:
n. A subordinary of triangular form having one of its angles at
   the fess point and the opposite aide at the edge of the escutcheon.
   When there is only one gyron on the shield it is bounded by two lines
   drawn from the fess point, one horizontally to the dexter side, and one
   to the dexter chief corner.

gyronny.t: a. [常作后置定语](纹章学用语)有三角形副章的
gyronny.d:
a. Covered with gyrons, or divided so as to form several
   gyrons; -- said of an escutcheon.

gyrophoric acid.t: [化] 石茸酸; 回转地衣酸

gyropilot.t:
n. 自动操纵装置
[电] 回转引示

gyroplane.d: n an aircraft that is supported in flight by unpowered rotating horizontal wings (or blades); forward propulsion is provided by a conventional propeller

gyropter.t: 旋翼机, 旋转式飞机

gyroresonance.t: 回转共振, 旋磁共振, (等离子)回旋共振

gyros.t:
(gyro 的复数) n. 陀螺仪, 回转仪, 陀螺
[计] 回转
gyros.d:
plural of gyro
n. a Greek sandwich: sliced roast lamb with onion and tomato stuffed into pita bread

gyroscope.t:
n. 陀螺仪, 回转仪
[化] 陀螺仪
gyroscope.d: n. rotating mechanism in the form of a universally mounted spinning wheel that offers resistance to turns in any direction

gyroscopes.t: n. 陀螺仪, 回转仪( gyroscope的复数形式 )
gyroscopes.d: n. rotating mechanism in the form of a universally mounted spinning wheel that offers resistance to turns in any direction

gyroscopic.d: a. having the characteristics of a gyroscope

gyroscopic integrator.t: [计] 陀螺积分器, 回转积分器

gyrose.t: n. [植]波状的,回状的,环形的

gyrosight.t: 陀螺瞄准具, 回转瞄准具

gyrostabilization.t: 陀螺仪的稳定, 回转致稳(作用)

gyrostabilizer.d: n. a stabilizer consisting of a heavy gyroscope that spins on a vertical axis; reduces side-to-side rolling of a ship or plane

gyrostat.d:
n. A modification of the gyroscope, consisting essentially
   of a fly wheel fixed inside a rigid case to which is attached a thin
   flange of metal for supporting the instrument. It is used in studying
   the dynamics of rotating bodies.

gyrostatic.t: 回转仪[轮]的, 陀螺仪的, 旋转学的
gyrostatic.d: a. Of or pertaining to the gyrostat or to gyrostatics.

gyrostatics.d:
n. The doctrine or theory of the gyrostat, or of the
   phenomena of rotating bodies.

gyrosyn.t: 陀螺感应罗盘, 陀螺同步罗盘

gyrosystem.t: 陀螺系统, 陀螺装置

gyrotrope.t: 电流变向器, 交换机

gyrounit.t: 陀螺环节, 陀螺组件

gyrus.t:
n. 回转, 脑回
[医] 脑回, 回
gyrus.d: n. a convex fold or elevation in the surface of the brain

gyrus cinguli.t: [医]扣带回：与胼胝体表面密切相连的弓状脑回，胼胝体沟将二者分隔

gyte.t: a. [苏格兰英语]发狂的；疯狂的, 狂妄的
gyte.d:
a. Delirious; senselessly extravagant; as, the man is clean
   gyte.

gyve.t:
n. 脚镣, 手铐
vt. 使上脚镣, 使上手铐
gyve.d:
n. A shackle; especially, one to confine the legs; a fetter.
v. t. To fetter; to shackle; to chain.
   H () the eighth letter of the English alphabet, is classed among the
   consonants, and is formed with the mouth organs in the same position as
   that of the succeeding vowel. It is used with certain consonants to
   form digraphs representing sounds which are not found in the alphabet,
   as sh, th, /, as in shall, thing, /ine (for zh see /274); also, to
   modify the sounds of some other letters, as when placed after c and p,
   with the former of which it represents a compound sound like that of
   tsh, as in charm (written also tch as in catch), with the latter, the
   sound of f, as i

gyves.t:
(gyve 的复数) n. 脚镣, 手铐
vt. 使上脚镣, 使上手铐
gyves.d:
plural of gyve
n. A shackle; especially, one to confine the legs; a fetter.
v. t. To fetter; to shackle; to chain.
   H () the eighth letter of the English alphabet, is classed among the
   consonants, and is formed with the mouth organs in the same position as
   that of the succeeding vowel. It is used with certain consonants to
   form digraphs representing sounds which are not found in the alphabet,
   as sh, th, /, as in shall, thing, /ine (for zh see /274); also, to
   modify the sounds of some other letters, as when placed after c and p,
   with the former of which it represents a compound sound like that of
   tsh, as in charm (written also tch as in catch), with the latter, the
   s
